title: Slay the Spire Build Planner
description: Built a lightweight planning tool to compare deck paths and relic synergies for higher ascension runs.

title: Course Outcome Dashboard
description: Created an interactive dashboard to track assignment completion, grades, and weekly study trends across classes.

title: Chess Opening Win Analysis
description: Analyzed a Kaggle chess dataset to study how opening choices affect outcomes by rating bracket and time control.

title: Digit Recognition with CNNs
description: Trained and evaluated convolutional neural networks for handwritten digit recognition with strong validation accuracy.

title: Texas Hold'em Game AI
description: Implemented a full poker simulation and several AI opponents with different betting and bluffing strategies.

title: Campus Event Recommender
description: Prototyped a recommendation model that suggests student events from category preferences and attendance history.

title: Workout Log Analyzer
description: Developed scripts to clean and visualize weekly training volume, intensity, and recovery indicators.

title: Competitive Programming Tracker
description: Built a tracker for solved problems, topic coverage, and contest pacing to guide weekly practice goals.

title: Movie Sentiment Classifier
description: Compared baseline and neural text models for binary sentiment classification and error analysis on review data.

title: Personal Finance Categorizer
description: Created a rule-assisted transaction categorizer with monthly spending summaries and anomaly highlights.

title: Transit Delay Predictor
description: Modeled bus delay risk from route, stop, and weather features to estimate likely late arrivals by hour.

title: Recipe Search Web App
description: Implemented ingredient-based search, filtering, and saved favorites with a responsive front-end interface.
